name: Super Low Fat Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Small onion, peeled and diced (1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan over medium-high heat, combine all ingredients.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-20 minutes, or until the liquid is reduced by half.
4. Puree small quantities of sauce at a time in a food processor or blender, pulsing on and off 3 to 4 times for a chunky sauce, longer for a smoother sauce.
